descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Abbott Cup playoff game, taking series lead 3-2.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, BC champions, defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3 on Sunday in their best-of-seven Abbott Cup series, with Richmond now leading 3-2. Humboldt, Saskatchewan's amateur junior hockey league champions, led 2-0 after the first period but Richmond tied it 2-2 in the second frame. Broncos coach Bernie Lynch criticized his team's performance ahead of the Centennial Cup tournament beginning Saturday in Humboldt.

attribution.headline: Humboldt Broncos fall to Richmond Sockeyes in Abbott Cup series
